output_contract.blocking_reasons: list of exact reason tokens from [coverage_gap_without_waiver,permit_inactive]

public_sources.text: Approval requires an ACTIVE permit and liability coverage of at least USD 2,000,000. A lower amount may pass only with a signed CFO waiver.
Liability coverage is USD 1,800,000 and current through 2027-05-31.

primary.target: Produce a disposition record for synthetic vendor Birch. Choose approve, conditionally_approve, or escalate.
